segments.text: How long, O Lord? Will You forget me forever? How long will You hide Your face from me?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: How long shall I take counsel in my soul, Having sorrow in my heart daily? How long will my enemy be exalted over me?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Consider and hear me, O Lord my God; Enlighten my eyes, Lest I sleep the sleep of death;
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Lest my enemy say, 'I have prevailed against him'; Lest those who trouble me rejoice when I am moved.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: But I have trusted in Your mercy; My heart shall rejoice in Your salvation.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I will sing to the Lord, Because He has dealt bountifully with me.
segments.speaker: David
